threats.title: Mirax Android RAT Turns Devices into SOCKS5 Proxies, Reaching 220,000 via Meta Ads

threats.title: Analysis of 216M Security Findings Shows a 4x Increase In Critical Risk (2026 Report)
threats.summary: OX Security recently analyzed 216 million security findings across 250 organizations over a 90-day period. The primary takeaway: while raw alert volume grew by 52% year-over-year, prioritized critical risk grew by nearly 400%. threats.title: 108 Malicious Chrome Extensions Steal Google and Telegram Data, Affecting 20,000 Users
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new campaign in which a cluster of 108 Google Chrome extensions has been found to communicate with the same command-and-control (C2) infrastructure with the goal of collecting user data and enabling browser-level abuse by injecting ads and arbitrary JavaScript code into every web page visited.
